title: Onboarding - Login - Cancel
scenario: Verify that tapping Cancel on the Login dialog returns the user to the "POLY LENS" Login screen.
steps: 1. Start the app for the first time, accept the license agreement, tap Continue, then Skip, then Continue to reach the Login screen.
2. Tap Login to open the Login dialog with Cancel and Continue options.
3. Tap Cancel and confirm the Login screen is visible again.
expected: Tapping Cancel on the Login dialog returns the user to the "POLY LENS" Login screen.
